label: Walls
guidance: Check for marks, holes, scuffs, hook damage, or scratches on all walls.

label: Ceiling
guidance: Check for water stains, cracks, mould, or damage.

label: Floor / carpet
guidance: Photograph the full floor plus close-ups of any stains, edges, or wear. Carpet condition is one of the most common bond dispute categories.

label: Windows, screens & tracks
guidance: Check windows, flyscreens, and tracks for damage or built-up dirt/mould.

label: Blinds / curtains
guidance: Check for missing slats, tears, stains, or broken mechanisms.

label: Doors
guidance: Check doors and frames for damage, marks, or misalignment.

label: Light fittings
guidance: Confirm fittings are undamaged and globes work.

label: Power points & switches
guidance: Check power points and switches are undamaged and working.

label: Smoke alarm
guidance: Confirm a smoke alarm is present and note its visible condition.

label: Oven interior
guidance: Photograph the inside of the oven, including racks and door glass. Oven cleanliness is a very common exit claim.

label: Stovetop
guidance: Check for stains, scratches, or damage to elements/burners.

label: Rangehood filter
guidance: Check for grease build-up on the filter.

label: Inside cupboards
guidance: Check inside cupboards and drawers for damage, mess, or pests.

label: Sink & taps
guidance: Check for leaks, chips, or limescale build-up.

label: Dishwasher
guidance: If included, check the interior, seals, and filter.

label: Benchtops
guidance: Check for scratches, burns, or stains.

label: Grout & sealant
guidance: Photograph grout and sealant condition around tiles and shower — mould/black spot disputes are common.

label: Shower screen
guidance: Check for cracks, soap scum build-up, or damaged seals.

label: Drains
guidance: Check for blockages or slow drainage.

label: Exhaust fan
guidance: Confirm it runs and check for dust build-up.

label: Toilet
guidance: Check for cracks, staining, or cistern issues.

label: Vanity
guidance: Check vanity and cabinet for water damage or marks.

label: Wardrobe interior & tracks
guidance: Check interior and sliding door tracks for damage.

label: Carpet under window
guidance: Photograph carpet under the window as a sun-fade baseline — useful evidence against later fade/discolouration claims.

label: Laundry taps
guidance: Check for leaks or damage.

label: Laundry tub
guidance: Check for cracks, stains, or blockages.

label: Dryer
guidance: If included, check condition and lint filter.

label: Garden / lawn
guidance: Photograph overall garden/lawn state — a very common exit claim category.

label: Balcony / deck
guidance: Check condition, railings, and drainage.

label: Garage
guidance: Check door operation and floor condition (oil stains etc).

label: Letterbox
guidance: Check condition and lock.

label: Bins present
guidance: Confirm bins are present and in good condition.
